docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, JOSUE AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, MELTON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTNUANCE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. MATTER CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 3, 2021 AT 8:30 A.M.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JOSUE MARTINEZ. DEFENDANT MELTON THOMPSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE AT PREVIOUS HEARING. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JULY 8, 2021 AT 8:30AM IN DEPARTMENT 506.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-03-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOSUE MARTINEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MELTON THOMPSON IS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
